raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Recent studies have shown that too many of California’s students are being placed in remedial courses when they don’t need to be.",
    "A recent PPIC study found that 80% of students entering Community College enroll in at least one remedial level course in English, math, or both.",
    "A majority of students placed into remedial courses are minority students who tend to have higher dropout rates than those who place into transfer-level courses.",
    "Developmental courses are considered to be one of the largest impediments to student success in California’s community colleges due to added time needed to complete these courses, increased costs to students, and a psychological effect of not feeling challenged by the coursework.",
    "Multiple measures programs have been implemented in other states with great success.",
    "There have been multiple studies showing lower success rates for students that were placed in remedial English or math courses."
  ]
}
```
